message.content:
用户需要找一个能搜索 Claude Code skills 的 skill，并安装它。

请调研：
1. Claude Code 是否有官方 skill 市场或注册中心？
2. 有没有 "skill-search" 或类似能发现/浏览/搜索 skills 的工具？
3. 社区中 skills 是如何被发现和安装的？
4. 如果存在这样的工具，给出具体的安装命令和用法。

搜索关键词建议：claude code skill marketplace, claude code skill search, claude code plugin registry, claude code skill discovery

汇报调研结论和操作建议。

Links: [{"title":"@astron-team/skillhub","url":"https://www.npmjs.com/package/@astron-team/skillhub"},{"title":"Your Claude Code Skills Might Be Stealing Your Credentials Right Now","url":"https://dev.to/harivenkatakrishnakotha/your-claude-code-skills-might-be-stealing-your-credentials-right-now-2d0h"},{"title":"wshobson/agents | DeepWiki","url":"https://deepwiki.com/wshobson/agents"},{"title":"Repello AI - AI Agent Skill Scanners: Every Tool Compared (2026)","url":"https://repello.ai/blog/ai-agent-skill-scanner?source=logo-lo_93cb394dc49c---1da65a443116"},{"title":"sickn33/antigravity-awesome-skills v7.8.0 on GitHub","url":"https://newreleases.io/project/github/sickn33/antigravity-awesome-skills/release/v7.8.0"},{"title":"GitHub - Jylhis/skills · GitHub","url":"https://github.com/Jylhis/skills"},{"title":"2026-04-17-技能专题","url":"https://blog.csdn.net/u012565112/article/details/160251762"},{"title":"Claude Code Skills Marketplace — Ultimate Guide","url":"https://skywork.ai/blog/ai-bot/claude-code-skills-marketplace-ultimate-guide/"},{"title":"Skills Directory: Review, Pricing & Alternatives |…","url":"https://vibecoding.app/tools/skills-directory"},{"title":"Official Plugins | anthropics/claude-code | DeepWiki","url":"https://deepwiki.com/anthropics/claude-code/4-official-plugins"}]

Here's a comprehensive summary of what the web search found about the **Claude Code skills marketplace and registry landscape in 2026**:

---

## 🌐 Key Marketplaces & Registries (2026)

### 1. **Official Anthropic Plugin Marketplace**
- Bundled directly in Claude Code at `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json`
- **13 official plugins** across 5 categories: Development (6), Productivity (4), Learning (2), Security (1)
- Includes: `code-review`, `commit-commands`, `feature-dev`, `plugin-dev`, `security-guidance`, etc.
- Source: [DeepWiki - anthropics/claude-code](https://deepwiki.com/anthropics/claude-code/4-official-plugins)

### 2. **skills.sh (Vercel)**
- **91,000+ skills** — the largest open registry
- Works with 15+ AI agents, not just Claude Code
- Best install experience via `npx skillsadd`

### 3. **SkillsMP**
- **800,000+** auto-indexed skills (scraped from GitHub)
- Discovery only — the largest raw catalog, but with no quality guarantees

### 4. **Skills Directory**
- **3,514+ verified skills** with community curation and quality control
- Focused on verified, working skills for Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf

### 5. **claudeskills.info**
- **140–658 curated skills** — hand-picked quality collection, good for beginners

### 6. **aitmpl.com**
- **1,000+ skills** across 7 types: skills + agents + hooks + MCPs + commands + plugins

### 7. **everything-claude-code (GitHub)**
- **181 skills + 47 agents** — 154K stars, popular starter kit

---

## 🔧 How the Marketplace Architecture Works

- **Plugins** are the distribution unit — they can bundle Skills (`SKILL.md`), MCP servers, subagents, and hooks
- **Marketplaces** are defined by a `marketplace.json` file (metadata + plugin list), hosted in Git repos
- **Installation**: `/plugin marketplace add <repo>` then `/plugin install <name>`
- **Skills** live at `.claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md` (project) or `~/.claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md` (user scope)
- **Cross-platform**: Skills follow the **AgentSkills.io** open standard, reusable across Claude Code, Cursor, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI

---

## ⚠️ Security Concerns (2026)

- **ClawHavoc campaign**: ~12% of skills on ClawHub contained malicious code — 335 coordinated malicious skills targeting credentials and establishing reverse shells
- **CVE-2026-25253**: One-click RCE vector requiring no skill installation
- Tools like **Repello SkillCheck** (browser-based security scanner) and **Cisco's CLI static analyzers** have emerged to fill the vetting gap
- Official recommendation: treat marketplaces as **software supply chains** — enforce version control, approvals, observability, and security scanning

---

## 🚀 Notable Community Projects

| Project | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| **@astron-team/skillhub** | Enterprise-grade, self-hosted skill registry CLI (Copyright 2026 iFlytek) |
| **sickn33/antigravity-awesome-skills** v7.8.0 | "Marketplace & Merge Sweep" — added Claude Code plugin marketplace manifests |
| **Jylhis/skills** | Personal skill registry with local marketplace support (May 2026) |
| **wshobson/agents** | 72 plugins, 112 agents, 146 skills — production-ready plugin marketplace |

---

Would you like me to dig deeper into any specific marketplace, security concern, or installation workflow?

Here are the key findings from the web search on **Claude Code skill search, tool discovery, and installation** (as of 2026):

---

## 🧩 Major Skill Marketplaces & Registries

### 1. **claude-plugins.dev** (Skills Registry)
- Skill: **`skills-discovery`** — a dedicated skill for discovering and installing other agent skills
- Search via API: `curl "https://claude-plugins.dev/api/skills?q=QUERY&limit=20"`
- Install: `npx skills-installer install @owner/repo/skill-name --client claude-code`
- Supports many clients: Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Codex, Gemini CLI, VS Code, and more

### 2. **@tarangchokshi/claude-skills-cli** (npm)
- One-command skill installer from **SkillsMP**
- `npx claude-skills-cli install <skill-name> --client claude-code`
- Search: `claude-skills-cli search <query>`

### 3. **@biggora/claude-plugins** (npm) — v1.3.5
- Full CLI marketplace for discovering, installing, and managing plugins/skills
- `npx @biggora/claude-plugins search`
- Install from Git: `npx skills add <repo-url> --skill <skill-name>`
- 25+ curated skills (captcha, n8n, YouTube, TypeScript, WordPress, testing, etc.)

### 4. **aiskillstore/marketplace** (GitHub)
- Security-audited skills for Claude Code & Codex
- Prompt-based install: paste a prompt into Claude Code to auto-download skills to `~/.claude/skills/`
- Latest release: Feb 28, 2026

### 5. **claude-superskills** (npm) — v1.22.0
- Universal installer for **55 reusable skills** across 8+ platforms
- `npx claude-superskills` (interactive) or `npx claude-superskills --bundle essential -y`
- Search: `npx claude-superskills --search "planning"`
- Bundles: essential, planning, research, content, product, career, developer, orchestration, all

### 6. **clawskills-rai** (PyPI) — Updated Apr 4, 2026
- Massive index: **125K total skills** (11K+ agent skills from 842 repos, 90K research, 24K tech)
- `pip install clawskills-rai`
- Search: `clawskills skill-search "kubernetes" --top 5`
- Install: `clawskills install docker-essentials`

### 7. **antigravity-awesome-skills** — v8.10.0 (Mar 26, 2026)
- 1,328+ skills for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, Windsurf, Cline
- `npx antigravity-awesome-skills`
- Newest skills include X/Twitter extraction, MCP server evaluation, HubSpot CRM, and study automation

---

## 🔧 Key Installation Commands Summary

| Tool | Command |
|------|---------|
| SkillsMP CLI | `npx claude-skills-cli install <skill> --client claude-code` |
| claude-plugins | `npx @biggora/claude-plugins search` |
| claude-superskills | `npx claude-superskills --bundle essential -y` |
| clawskills-rai | `clawskills install <skill>` |
| antigravity | `npx antigravity-awesome-skills` |
| skills-installer | `npx skills-installer install @owner/repo/skill-name` |

---

## 🆕 Notable 2026 Developments

- **Anthropic's official plugin system** (Feb 2026) — `/plugin` command in Claude Code, LSP support for all major languages, team-shared `settings.json` for auto-configuration
- **Skill discovery agents** like **oodle-ai/discovery-agent-skills** for automated tech stack & observability discovery
- The ecosystem has grown to **1,300+ skills** across multiple registries, with CLI tools that cross-install between Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Windsurf, Gemini CLI, and more

content.content:
# skills-discovery — Full Breakdown

## What It Does

skills-discovery is a "meta skill" that enables an AI agent to proactively search the claude-plugins.dev registry for other Agent Skills and install them on behalf of the user. It's designed to help agents recognize when a specialized skill might be better suited to a task than their general knowledge.

The skill asks the agent to continually check: "might a skill exist that handles this better than my base knowledge?" It's meant to be used before starting non-trivial work, especially involving "specific technologies, frameworks, or file formats" or expert domains.

## Installation

1. **Download** the `skills-discovery.zip` file.
2. **Enable Skills** in Claude by visiting `claude.ai/settings/capabilities` and finding the Skills section.
3. **Upload** the ZIP file to Claude via the "Upload skill" button.

The skill can also be installed programmatically via the `skills-installer` CLI (see below).

## Searching for Skills

The core search mechanism uses a REST API endpoint:

```
curl "https://claude-plugins.dev/api/skills?q=QUERY&limit=20&offset=0"
```

**Parameters:**
- `q` — search query (e.g., "frontend", "python", "pdf")
- `limit` — results per page (max 100)
- `offset` — pagination offset

**Response structure** includes an array of skills each with: `id`, `name`, `namespace`, `sourceUrl`, `description`, `author`, `installs`, `stars`, plus `total`, `limit`, and `offset` metadata.

**Search strategies:** Use 1–3 specific terms. Combine "technology + task" for best results. If results are poor, broaden or try synonyms.

## Installation via CLI (skills-installer)

The installer supports multiple clients and scopes:

| Command | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `npx skills-installer install @owner/repo/skill-name` | Global install, default client |
| `npx skills-installer install @owner/repo/skill-name --client cursor` | Specify a client |
| `npx skills-installer install @owner/repo/skill-name --local` | Project-specific scope |
| `npx skills-installer install @owner/repo/skill-name --client cursor --local` | Combined flags |
| `npx skills-installer list` | List installed skills |
| `npx skills-installer uninstall @owner/repo/skill-name` | Remove a skill |

**Supported clients:** claude-code, codex, cursor, amp, opencode, goose, github, vscode, letta, gemini, windsurf, antigravity, trae, qoder, codebuddy.

**Defaults:** client = `claude-code`, scope = global.

## Presenting Results

When showing findings, the skill instructs agents to:
- Show **3–5 most relevant results**
- Include name, namespace, description, stars, and installs
- Explain relevance to the user's specific task
- Prioritize skills with high install counts
- Always ask for confirmation before installing
- Offer direct help if no good skill exists or the user declines

## Additional API Endpoint

| Endpoint | Description |
|---|---|
| `GET /api/skills/search?q=QUERY` | Search skills |
| `GET /api/skills/@owner/repo/skill-name` | Get skill details |

Web registry: `https://claude-plugins.dev/skills`

## Troubleshooting

- **No results:** Broaden search terms or browse the web registry.
- **Installation fails:** "Verify namespace format: `@owner/repo/skill-name`", check the skill exists, check permissions.
- **Skill not activating:** User may need to restart their client, verify the installation path, and confirm a `SKILL.md` exists there.

Extends gstack. · GitHub","url":"https://github.com/ariadoss/superskills"},{"title":"几种安装 ClaudeCode Skills的方式","url":"https://www.cnblogs.com/Zzbj/p/19903494#commentform"},{"title":"GitHub - eight-acres-lab/skillplus: A compilable skill package standard for reliable content-generation agents. · GitHub","url":"https://github.com/eight-acres-lab/skillplus"}]

Here are the results of the web search for **"claude-superskills npm search bundles installation 2026"**:

---

## claude-superskills v1.22.0

**Source:** [npmjs.com/package/claude-superskills](https://www.npmjs.com/package/claude-superskills?activeTab=dependencies)

A universal installer for AI skills that can install **55 reusable AI skills** across multiple platforms including:
- Claude Code
- GitHub Copilot CLI
- OpenAI Codex
- OpenCode
- Gemini CLI
- Antigravity
- Cursor IDE
- AdaL CLI

**If Claude Desktop is detected**, the installer can also generate a Claude Cowork plugin zip for manual upload.

### Quick Start

```bash
# Interactive smart installation
npx claude-superskills

# Auto smart update/install
npx claude-superskills -y -q

# Install curated bundles
npx claude-superskills --bundle essential -y
npx claude-superskills --bundle content -y
npx claude-superskills --bundle career -y
```

### Available Bundles

| Bundle | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `essential` | Core workflow skills (discovery, orchestration, planning, prompt optimization) |
| `planning` | Pre-implementation design and structured execution |
| `research` | Deep research and resource discovery |
| `content` | YouTube, audio, document conversion, storytelling |
| `product` | Product strategy, architecture, delivery, leadership |
| `career` | Resume, job search, interview, negotiation, portfolio |
| `developer` | Skill creation workflows |
| `orchestration` | Resource discovery and planning |
| `all` | All 55 available skills |

### Search & Options

```bash
npx claude-superskills --search "planning"
npx claude-superskills --search "resume"
npx claude-superskills --list-bundles
```

**Options:** `--bundle`, `--search`, `--list-bundles`, `--all`/`-a`, `--yes`/`-y`, `--quiet`/`-q`, `--help`/`-h`, `--version`/`-v`

---

## Related: Alternative Skill Packages Found

1. **superskills v2.5.0** ([GitHub - ariadoss/superskills](https://github.com/ariadoss/superskills)) — A curated AI skills pack for Claude Code, OpenCode, Codex CLI, etc. with 33 core skills + 43 gstack skills + 173 marketing skills + 35 design skills. Installed via `git clone` and `./setup`.

2. **skillplus** ([GitHub - eight-acres-lab/skillplus](https://github.com/eight-acres-lab/skillplus)) — A compilable skill package standard installed via `npm i -g @e8s/skillplus`, supporting search, compile, and copy commands for content-generation agents.

3. **Chinese blog post** (2026-04-21) — A detailed guide on installing Claude Code skills, covering plugin marketplace, `npx skills add`, and manual methods.

---

Let me know if you'd like deeper details on any specific aspect of these tools!


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

# ClawSkills-RAI v0.2.1 — Full Summary

## Description

ClawSkills is a Python package from the **Responsible AI Lab @ Florida State University** that bundles over 121,000 searchable skills — covering 11,389 agent skills from 842 repositories, 90,000+ research papers, and 24,000+ tech sources — into a single offline-searchable index.

The total 125K skills break down into three categories:

| Category | Count | Sources |
|---|---|---|
| **Agent skills** (after dedup) | 11,389 | ClawHub (4,293), 10 awesome lists (5,028), GitHub code search (1,135), repo mining (933) |
| **Research skills** | 90,084 | PLOS, arXiv, eLife, PMC, Springer, CrossRef |
| **Tech skills** | 24,515 | GitHub repos, StackOverflow, Tavily/Baidu/Zhihu/XHS |

The top contributing repo is `clawdbot/skills` and `openclaw/skills`, each contributing 7,546 agent-template files.

## Installation Command

```
pip install clawskills-rai
```

No API key is required for searching or installing. Python ≥3.10 is required. The package is MIT-licensed.

## Usage Workflow

**Step 1 — One-time index download:**
```
clawskills bundle-install --domain claw
```
This downloads a pre-built SQLite index. Alternatively, `--auto` auto-detects the project type.

**Step 2 — Search:**
```
clawskills skill-search "kubernetes" --top 5
clawskills skill-search "CRISPR" --domain research --top 3
```

**Step 3 — Browse and install:**
```
clawskills install "react" --list          # browse matching skills
clawskills install "react" --pick 2        # install the 2nd result
clawskills install docker-essentials       # install best match directly
```
The `install` command writes a `SKILL.md` file into `.claude/skills/`, which tools like Claude Code, Cursor, OpenClaw, and Codex automatically pick up.

## How It Indexes Skills

The **ClawHub API** is the primary entry point. The four-stage build pipeline (taking ~40 minutes) works as follows:

1. **ClawHub API** — queries the registry and extracts page data
2. **Repo discovery** — identifies GitHub repositories containing skill definitions
3. **File mining** — extracts every `SKILL.md` and `SOUL.md` from each discovered repo
4. **Deduplication** — removes duplicates across all sources

For the full build-from-scratch:
```
export GITHUB_TOKEN=<YOUR_GITHUB_TOKEN>
clawskills claw-full-build --max-skills 50000 --max-repos 1000
```

93% of agent skills are domain-classified across 8 categories: AI & Agents (4,265), Web & Apps (3,877), DevTools (731), Data (548), Security (300), Linux (261), Cloud (166), and Programming (164).

An additional `capture` command uses an LLM (via `OPENAI_API_KEY`) to generate new skills on a given topic:
```
clawskills capture "React Server Components@20"
```

## CLI Reference Summary

| Command | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `install "<query>"` | Search + install a skill |
| `install "<query>" --list` | Browse matches |
| `skill-search "<query>"` | Search the full 125K index |
| `claw-full-build` | Build index from scratch (~40 min) |
| `bundle-install --domain claw` | Download pre-built index |
| `capture "<topic>@N"` | Generate N skills via LLM |

## Environment Variables

- `GITHUB_TOKEN` — needed for `claw-full-build` (higher API rate limits)
- `OPENAI_API_KEY` — needed for the `capture` command
- `HF_ENDPOINT` — set to `https://hf-mirror.com` for users in China downloading the bundle

The package also offers optional extras: `playwright`, `tavily`, `dist`, `extended`, and `dev`.

Links: [{"title":"I've added Claude Code skills from GitHub's vercel-labs/skills repository to try it out | DevelopersIO","url":"https://dev.classmethod.jp/en/articles/varcel-labs-skills/"},{"title":"Deploy Apps with AI Using Circle and Vercel Skills | Circle","url":"https://www.circle.com/blog/from-prompt-to-deployment-with-circle-skills-and-vercel-skills"},{"title":"Agent Resources","url":"https://vercel.com/docs/agent-resources"},{"title":"24小时15.3K安装量稳坐王座！老金愿称之为元Skill！","url":"https://developer.aliyun.com/article/1709575"},{"title":"feat: add automatic skills installation · Issue #28 · seunggabi/claude-command","url":"https://github.com/seunggabi/claude-command/issues/28"},{"title":"Building skillgrab: auto-detecting stacks across JS, Python, Go, mobile and infra to install AI agent skills in one command","url":"https://dev.to/briascoi/building-skillgrab-auto-detecting-stacks-across-js-python-go-mobile-and-infra-to-install-ai-1276#comments"},{"title":"skills/README.md at main · vercel-labs/skills","url":"https://github.com/vercel-labs/skills/blob/main/README.md"},{"title":"Skills.sh - The Open Ecosystem for AI Agent Skills","url":"https://navtools.ai/tool/skills-sh"},{"title":"@seenhealth/skills","url":"https://www.npmjs.com/package/@seenhealth/skills?ref=pkgstats.com"},{"title":"Agent Skills","url":"https://examples.vercel.com/docs/agent-resources/skills"}]

## Search Results Summary

Here's what I found about **skills.sh**, **Vercel**, and installing skills with `npx skills add`:

### What is skills.sh?

[skills.sh](https://skills.sh) is an **open ecosystem for AI agent skills** launched by Vercel Labs. It's a directory and package manager for discovering and installing reusable capabilities ("skills") for AI coding agents like **Claude Code**, **Codex**, **Cursor**, **Cline**, **GitHub Copilot**, and 50+ others.

### Key Commands

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| `npx skills add <owner/repo>` | Install a skill from GitHub |
| `npx skills find [query]` | Search for skills interactively or by keyword |
| `npx skills list` | List installed skills |
| `npx skills remove <skill-name>` | Remove installed skills |
| `npx skills update` | Update all skills to latest versions |
| `npx skills init [name]` | Create a new SKILL.md template |
| `npx skills experimental_install` | Restore skills from `skills-lock.json` |

### Installation Examples

```bash
# Install all skills from a repo
npx skills add vercel-labs/agent-skills

# Install a specific skill
npx skills add vercel-labs/agent-skills --skill frontend-design

# Install to Claude Code only (non-interactive)
npx skills add owner/repo -a claude-code -y

# Install globally
npx skills add owner/repo -g

# Search for skills
npx skills find typescript
```

### How It Works

1. **`npx skills add <source>`** clones the GitHub repo, scans for `SKILL.md` files
2. You select which skills to install (interactive or via `--skill` flag)
3. You select target agent(s) (e.g., `claude-code`)
4. Skills are placed in `.claude/skills/<skill-name>/SKILL.md` (project) or `~/.claude/skills/` (global)
5. Installation info is recorded in **`skills-lock.json`** (like `package-lock.json`)

### Notable Skills

- **find-skills** — The #1 most installed skill (52k+ installs in 4 days). Acts as a "meta skill" that teaches agents how to search for and install other skills using natural language.
- **playwright-cli** — Automates browser interactions for web testing
- **Circle Skills** — USDC payments, crosschain transfers, wallet integration
- **Vercel Skills** — Deploy apps from AI agents

### Sources

The official CLI tool lives at: **[github.com/vercel-labs/skills](https://github.com/vercel-labs/skills)**

To install skills to Claude Code specifically:

```bash
npx skills add <owner/repo> -a claude-code -y
```

## Search Results Summary: Claude Code Native Skill Installation & Plugin Marketplace (2026)

Here's a comprehensive overview of what I found:

### 🔧 What are Claude Code Skills?

Skills are **modular capability extensions** for Claude Code. Each skill is defined by a `SKILL.md` file (markdown with YAML frontmatter) that contains:
- **`name`** — Skill identifier
- **`description`** — Tells Claude when to auto-invoke the skill

content.content:
# Skills.sh — Summary

## What It Is

The site describes itself as "The Open Agent Skills Ecosystem." Skills are "reusable capabilities for AI agents" that you can install to give agents "access to procedural knowledge." The homepage features an ASCII "SKILLS" logo and a leaderboard showing install counts across thousands of skills. It is built by Vercel (noted by the "Made with love by Vercel" badge).

## The `npx skills` Command

The installation command shown on the page is:

```
$ npx skillsadd<owner/repo>
```

This appears to be formatted without spaces, but the intended syntax is `npx skills add <owner/repo>` — scoping to an owner (GitHub user/organization) and a repository name. The page says you can "install them with a single command."

## Searching & Discovering Skills

The page provides a **"Search skills..."** search bar with a keyboard shortcut `/`. The **Skills Leaderboard** lets you toggle between:
- **All Time** (showing 91,046 total installs across all skills)
- **Trending (24h)**
- **Hot**

## The `find-skills` Meta-Skill

Ranked **#1** on the leaderboard with **1.4 million installs**, this skill lives at the `vercel-labs/skills` repository. It is a meta-skill — a skill designed to help you discover other skills.

## Installation Process

No detailed step-by-step setup is provided on this homepage. The core workflow is: run the `npx skills add <owner/repo>` command, and the skill is installed into your agent environment. No manual downloading or configuration is described.

## Supported Agents

The page lists **20 supported agent platforms** that work with skills, including Claude Code, Cursor, Cline, Windsurf, GitHub Copilot, Codex, Gemini, and others — each with a logo linking to its respective site.

Web search results for query: ""find-skills" claude code meta skill search install npx skills add 2026"

Links: [{"title":"精选 Skills 清单","url":"https://blog.csdn.net/Jmilk/article/details/160251639"},{"title":"24小时15.3K安装量稳坐王座！老金愿称之为元Skill！","url":"https://developer.aliyun.com/article/1709575"},{"title":"几种安装 ClaudeCode Skills的方式","url":"https://www.cnblogs.com/Zzbj/p/19903494#commentform"},{"title":"深入解析 Vercel Skill：跨 Agent 的技能包管理器","url":"https://cloud.tencent.com/developer/article/2631927?from=15425&frompage=seopage"},{"title":"现在Agent Skills 那么火，有什么强烈推荐的Agent Skills吗？ - Next蔡蔡 的回答","url":"https://www.zhihu.com/question/1992605969721616211/answer/2001068620139221374"},{"title":"Skills.sh - The Open Ecosystem for AI Agent Skills","url":"https://navtools.ai/tool/skills-sh"},{"title":"Claude Code 装上这10个神级技能，让它真正替你“干活”","url":"https://www.ai360labs.com/playground/news/207616988241739780/detail"},{"title":"Claude Code 效率进阶完全指南：从基础Skills到多智能体协作","url":"https://blog.csdn.net/weimeilayer/article/details/160857583"},{"title":"Claude Code 核心技能配置指南：提升效率的 10 个必装技能_服务软件_什么值得买","url":"https://post.smzdm.com/p/a8272knl/"},{"title":"盘点当下 Claude Code / OpenCode 最火的 10 个 Agent Skills","url":"https://www.modb.pro/db/2021041152561078272"}]

## 搜索结果总结

以下是对 **"find-skills"** 及 Claude Code 技能生态的搜索发现：

---

### 🔍 find-skills 是什么？

**find-skills** 是由 Vercel 官方发布的一个**元技能（Meta Skill）**，本质上是 "帮你找 Skill 的 Skill"。它作为 AI Agent 的"技能搜索引擎"，让你可以通过自然语言搜索、安装和管理 skills.sh 生态中的其他技能。

- **GitHub 仓库**: [vercel-labs/skills/tree/main/skills/find-skills](https://github.com/vercel-labs/skills/tree/main/skills/find-skills)
- **安装量**: 超过 94K（skills.sh 生态市场榜首），24小时安装量达 15.3K+

---

### 📦 核心命令

| 命令 | 功能 |
|------|------|
| `npx skills find [query]` | 搜索技能（交互式或按关键词） |
| `npx skills add <package>` | 安装技能 |
| `npx skills list` | 查看已安装技能 |
| `npx skills remove <package>` | 卸载技能 |
| `npx skills check` | 检查可更新的技能 |
| `npx skills update` | 更新所有技能 |

---

### 🛠️ 安装方式

**推荐安装命令（Vercel 官方）**:
```bash
npx skills add https://github.com/vercel-labs/skills --skill find-skills
```
或简写：
```bash
npx skills add vercel-labs/skills@find-skills -g -y
```

**其他安装方式**：
- 从 GitHub 仓库安装指定 skill：`npx skills add https://github.com/user/repo --skill skill-name -g -y`
- 从本地 `.zip` 安装：`npx skills add ~/Downloads/xxx.zip -g -y`
- 从本地文件夹安装：`npx skills add ~/my-skill-folder -g -y`
- 手动复制到全局目录：`cp -r skill-folder ~/.claude/skills/`

**参数说明**：
- `-g`：全局安装（所有项目可用，存于 `~/.claude/skills/`）
- `-y`：跳过确认提示
- 不加 `-g` 则为项目级安装（存于 `./.claude/skills/`）

---

### ⚠️ 已知问题与注意事项

1. **触发不稳定**：AI 是语义理解的，建议在询问时带上 **"skill"** 关键词（如"帮我搜索一个数据分析的 **skill**"），这样更容易触发 find-skills
2. **Windows 兼容性问题**：原版在 Windows 的 Claude Code Bash 环境中可能无输出。有人提供了修复版：[KimYx0207/findskill](https://github.com/KimYx0207/findskill)
3. **安装后需重启**：安装完成后必须**完全退出并重新打开** Claude Code 才能生效
4. **`npx skills list` 局限性**：只能列出通过 `npx skills add` 安装的技能，手动复制的不会被识别

---

### 🌟 推荐优先级

很多资料建议按照以下梯队安装：

**第一梯队（核心必装）**：
- `find-skills` — 生态搜索引擎
- `agent-browser` — 让 Claude 操作浏览器
- `summarize` — 长文档提炼

**第二梯队（进阶）**：
- `skill-creator` — 创建自己的技能
- `tmux` — 终端会话管理
- `testing` / `docs` / `refactor` 类技能

---

### 📚 相关资料

- [Skills.sh 官网](https://skills.sh/) — Vercel 官方技能市场
- [CSDN 精选技能清单](https://blog.csdn.net/Jmilk/article/details/160251639)（2026-04 更新）
- [阿里云开发者社区 - find-skills 详解](https://developer.aliyun.com/article/1709575)
- [知乎回答 - find-skills 使用指南](https://www.zhihu.com/question/1992605969721616211/answer/2001068620139221374)
- [腾讯云 - Vercel Skill 深度解析](https://cloud.tencent.com/developer/article/2631927)

content.content:
# Anthropic Skills Repository — Overview

The repository at **`anthropics/skills`** is the public home for Agent Skills — folders of instructions, scripts, and resources that Claude loads dynamically to improve performance on specialized tasks.

## Repository Stats
- ⭐ 130k stars | 15.3k forks | 856 watchers
- Languages: Python (84.4%), HTML (12.4%), Shell (1.9%), JavaScript (1.3%)

## What's Inside

| Directory | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| `./skills/` | Example skills for Creative & Design, Development & Technical, Enterprise & Communication, and Document Skills |
| `./spec/` | The Agent Skills specification |
| `./template/` | A starter skill template |

Notable open-source (Apache 2.0) skills include ones for art, music, design, testing web apps, MCP server generation, and enterprise workflows. **Document skills** (`docx`, `pdf`, `pptx`, `xlsx`) are source-available (not fully open source) and power Claude's built-in document creation capabilities.

## Installation via Claude Code

### 1. Register the repository as a Plugin marketplace:
```
/plugin marketplace add anthropics/skills
```

### 2. Install a specific skill set:

**Interactive method:**
1. `Browse and install plugins`
2. Select `anthropic-agent-skills`
3. Choose `document-skills` or `example-skills`
4. Select `Install now`

**Direct CLI install:**
```
/plugin install document-skills@anthropic-agent-skills
/plugin install example-skills@anthropic-agent-skills
```

### 3. Use the skill:
After installing, just mention the skill. For example:
> "Use the PDF skill to extract the form fields from `path/to/some-file.pdf`"

## Claude.ai (Paid Plans)
All example skills are already available to paid plans in Claude.ai. Custom skills can be uploaded following [this guide](https://support.claude.com/en/articles/12512180-using-skills-in-claude#h_a4222fa77b).

## Claude API
Pre-built skills can be used and custom skills uploaded via the [Skills API Quickstart](https://docs.claude.com/en/api/skills-guide#creating-a-skill).

## Creating a Basic Skill

Each skill is a folder with a `SKILL.md` file containing YAML frontmatter + instructions:

```markdown
---
name: my-skill-name
description: A clear description of what this skill does and when to use it
---

# My Skill Name

[Add your instructions here that Claude will follow when this skill is active]

## Examples
- Example usage 1
- Example usage 2

## Guidelines
- Guideline 1
- Guideline 2
```

Only two frontmatter fields are required: **`name`** (lowercase, hyphens) and **`description`**.

## Reference Links
- [What are skills?](https://support.claude.com/en/articles/12512176-what-are-skills)
- [Using skills in Claude](https://support.claude.com/en/articles/12512180-using-skills-in-claude)
- [Creating custom skills](https://support.claude.com/en/articles/12512198-creating-custom-skills)
- [Agent Skills blog post](https://anthropic.com/engineering/equipping-agents-for-the-real-world-with-agent-skills)
- [agentskills.io](http://agentskills.io) — the standard specification

Web search results for query: "Claude Code /plugin marketplace add search skills command native 2026"

Links: [{"title":"yusufkaraaslan/Skill_Seekers v3.5.0 on GitHub","url":"https://newreleases.io/project/github/yusufkaraaslan/Skill_Seekers/release/v3.5.0"},{"title":"feat: Enhanced UX for plugin marketplaces with Claude Code integration · Issue #258 · vercel-labs/skills","url":"https://github.com/vercel-labs/skills/issues/258"},{"title":"feat: add plugin search command to search all marketplace plugins · Issue #99 · claudeup/claudeup","url":"https://github.com/claudeup/claudeup/issues/99"},{"title":"Anthropic憋了3年的技能系统，安装只需47秒","url":"https://www.163.com/dy/article/KP9BOSV605561FZV.html"},{"title":"Internal Claude Code Plugin: Referencing and distributing plugins from separate repositories in the marketplace | DevelopersIO","url":"https://dev.classmethod.jp/en/articles/claude-code-marketplace-source-external-repo/#installing-and-using"},{"title":"Claude Code 中好用的 Skill & Plugin 大全","url":"https://blog.csdn.net/EthanCo/article/details/160456916"},{"title":"GitHub - ShurikenTrade/shuriken-skills: Agent-consumable integration skills for the Shuriken platform 🥷 · GitHub","url":"https://github.com/ShurikenTrade/shuriken-skills"},{"title":"Getting Started | wshobson/agents | DeepWiki","url":"https://deepwiki.com/wshobson/agents/3-getting-started"},{"title":"Claude Code Skills Marketplace — Ultimate Guide","url":"https://skywork.ai/blog/ai-bot/claude-code-skills-marketplace-ultimate-guide/"},{"title":"Official Plugins | anthropics/claude-code | DeepWiki","url":"https://deepwiki.com/anthropics/claude-code/4-official-plugins"}]

Here's a summary of the search results for your query about **Claude Code plugin marketplace, add/search skills commands, and native features in 2026**:

## Key Findings

### 1. Native Plugin Marketplace Commands
Claude Code has built-in plugin management commands:
- **`/plugin`** — Opens the built-in plugin browser (Discover tab)
- **`/plugin marketplace add <owner/repo>`** — Adds a third-party marketplace source
- **`/plugin install [plugin-name]`** — Installs a plugin from a registered marketplace
- **`/plugin search [query]`** — Searches available plugins/skills

### 2. Marketplace Architecture (2026)
- Marketplaces are defined by a **`marketplace.json`** file listing plugins and their sources
- Plugins bundle **Skills** (`SKILL.md`), **MCP servers**, **agents**, **commands**, and **hooks**
- External repositories can be referenced via `source` types: `url`, `github`, `git-subdir`, `npm`, `pip`
- The official Anthropic marketplace includes ~15+ plugins across categories: **development**, **productivity**, **learning**, **security**

### 3. Skill Installation Methods
| Method | Command / Approach |
|---|---|
| **Marketplace search & install** | `/plugin install [name]` or `/plugin search [query]` |
| **Local installation** | `/plugin install --local ./path/to/skill` |
| **Manual placement** | Copy to `~/.claude/plugins/` or `.claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md` |

### 4. Proposed Features (GitHub Issues)
- Issue [#258 on vercel-labs/skills](https://github.com/vercel-labs/skills/issues/258) proposes deferring to native `claude marketplace add` CLI when available
- Issue [#99 on claudeup/claudeup](https://github.com/claudeup/claudeup/issues/99) proposes a **`claudeup plugin search`** command to search across all installed marketplace plugins with flags like `--content`, `--type skills`, `--marketplace`

### 5. Community Resources
- The **[wshobson/agents](https://deepwiki.com/wshobson/agents/3-getting-started)** marketplace offers **72 plugins** with **112 agents**, **146 skills**, and **79 tools**
- Projects like **Shuriken** use `/plugin marketplace add ShurikenTrade/shuriken-skills` to distribute agent skills
- The **Skill_Seekers** v3.5.0 (April 2026) includes a `MarketplacePublisher` to publish skills to Claude Code plugin marketplace repos

Would you like me to dig deeper into any specific aspect (e.g., how to create a marketplace, publish plugins, or use specific search commands)?

The user wants to find a skill that can search Claude Code skills, and install it.

The clear winner for this use case is `find-skills` from Vercel's skills.sh ecosystem. It is:
- The #1 most installed skill (1.4M+ installs)

content.text:
现在信息非常充分。以下是完整的调研结论。

---

## 鉴定要义

1. **Claude Code 没有官方的统一 skill 市场**，但 Anthropic 提供了一个官方开源仓库 (`anthropics/skills`) 和内置的 `/plugin` 系统，社区有多个注册中心。
2. **存在专门用于搜索 skills 的 meta-skill**：Vercel labs 的 `find-skills` 是业界事实标准，安装量超过 140 万，专为"帮你找 skill"而生。
3. **最佳安装路径**：通过 `npx skills` CLI 工具安装 `find-skills`，安装完成后在 Claude Code 中用自然语言即可搜索其他技能。
4. **次要选择**：`claude-superskills`（55 个打包技能）、`clawskills-rai`（12 万+离线索引）、`skills-discovery`（claude-plugins.dev 生态）。

---

## 详考

### 一、Claude Code Skill 生态架构

Claude Code 的 Skill 本质上是一个包含 `SKILL.md` 文件的目录（YAML frontmatter + markdown 指令），存放在以下位置之一：

| 作用域 | 路径 |
|--------|------|
| 全局 | `~/.claude/skills/<name>/` |
| 项目 | `.claude/skills/<name>/` |
| 插件内 | 由插件 bundle 附带 |

Claude Code 内置 `/plugin` 命令体系：
- `/plugin marketplace add <owner/repo>` -- 注册第三方市场源
- `/plugin search [query]` -- 搜索可用插件
- `/plugin install [name]` -- 安装插件

官方源：`anthropics/skills`（130K stars），包含文档技能、示例技能等，通过 `/plugin marketplace add anthropics/skills` 接入。

### 二、Skill 搜索引擎 / 发现工具横向对比

#### 1. find-skills（强烈推荐） -- by Vercel labs

这是**最符合你需求的答案**。它是一个"元技能"（meta-skill），专门用来发现和安装其他技能。

- 仓库：`github.com/vercel-labs/skills`
- 安装量：140 万+（skills.sh 生态第一，24 小时安装量 1.5 万+）
- 搜索命令：`npx skills find [query]`
- 安装命令：`npx skills add vercel-labs/skills@find-skills -g -y`
- 底层引擎：skills.sh 是 Vercel 运营的开放 agent 技能生态系统，支持 20+ agent 平台（Claude Code、Cursor、Codex、Gemini CLI 等）

在你本机的安装命令：
```bash
npx skills add vercel-labs/skills@find-skills -g -y
```
安装后重开 Claude Code，然后直接提问"帮我搜索一个数据分析的 skill"或"find skills for testing"即可触发。

---

#### 2. claude-superskills（备选）

- 仓库：`npmjs.com/package/claude-superskills` v1.22.0
- 55 个预打包的可复用技能，按 bundle 分类（essential、planning、research、content、product、career、developer、orchestration）
- 安装：`npx claude-superskills --bundle essential -y`
- 搜索：`npx claude-superskills --search "planning"`
- 本质上是**技能包管理器**，不是搜索引擎，适合想一次批量安装常用技能的用户

---

#### 3. clawskills-rai（学术/大规模索引）

- 来自佛罗里达州立大学 Responsible AI Lab
- **12.5 万条可搜索索引**：11,389 个 agent skill + 9 万+ 研究论文 + 2.4 万+ 技术源
- 安装：`pip install clawskills-rai` + `clawskills bundle-install --domain claw`
- 搜索：`clawskills skill-search "kubernetes" --top 5`
- 安装：`clawskills install docker-essentials`
- 优点：支持离线搜索、数据量大；缺点：Python 依赖，非 Claude Code 原生体验

---

#### 4. skills-discovery（claude-plugins.dev 生态）

- 链接：`https://claude-plugins.dev/skills/@Kamalnrf/claude-plugins/skills-discovery`
- 通过 REST API 搜索：`curl "https://claude-plugins.dev/api/skills?q=QUERY&limit=20"`
- 安装：`npx skills-installer install @Kamalnrf/claude-plugins/skills-discovery`
- 生态规模较小，API 可用但缺乏 CLI 原生搜索体验

---

### 三、社区技能发现方式总结

| 方式 | 工具/命令 | 技能数量 |
|------|-----------|---------|
| skills.sh 搜索 | `npx skills find <query>` 或 skills.sh 网页 | 数万 |
| claude-plugins.dev API | `curl .../api/skills?q=...` 或网页浏览 | 数千 |
| ClawSkills 离线索引 | `clawskills skill-search <query>` | 12.5 万 |
| npm 包管理器 | `npm search claude-code-skill` | 数百 |
| GitHub 直接搜索 | `site:github.com SKILL.md claude-code` | 数万 |
| 官方插件市场 | `/plugin search <query>` | ~15 个官方插件 |

### 四、安全隐患（2026 年值得关注）

社区市场存在恶意技能问题。ClawHavoc 活动曾在 ClawHub 上投放 335 个恶意技能，窃取凭证并建立反向 shell。**建议从可信源安装**：
- Vercel labs 官方仓库（`vercel-labs/skills`）
- Anthropic 官方仓库（`anthropics/skills`）
- `aiskillstore/marketplace`（经过安全审计）

---

## 伯乐之荐

**首选方案：安装 find-skills 作为你的技能搜索引擎。**

这是社区公认的、目的最匹配的方案，由 Vercel 官方维护，安装量第一，直接在 Claude Code 内用自然语言交互。

具体操作步骤：

```bash
# 第一步：安装 find-skills 元技能（全局）
npx skills add vercel-labs/skills@find-skills -g -y

# 第二步：完全退出并重新打开 Claude Code
# （Skill 在启动时加载，必须重启才能生效）

# 第三步：在 Claude Code 中直接提问
# "帮我搜索一个数据分析的 skill"
# "find skills for react testing"
# 它就会自动搜索 skills.sh 并推荐安装

# 附：手动搜索技能
npx skills find typescript
npx skills find "code review"
```

**备选方案**（当你想离线搜索或需要更大索引时）：
```bash
pip install clawskills-rai
clawskills bundle-install --domain claw
clawskills skill-search "react testing"
```

**风险提示**：
- `find-skills` 依赖 skills.sh 在线服务，无网络时无法搜索
- 从社区安装未知技能前，建议检查 `SKILL.md` 内容，避免恶意代码
- 如果使用 Windows，`find-skills` 可能需要修复版（`KimYx0207/findskill`）
